item.text: I'm treating this as the final execution pass and focusing on T4 plus checkpointing. First I'm checking whether the shared execution checkpoint exists so I can update it with the current task and sense-check state instead of touching `finalize.json`.

item.text: The shared checkpoint file doesn't exist yet, but the plan directory is writable. I'm creating a full checkpoint snapshot with the tracked task and sense-check state so recovery doesn't depend on the per-batch files alone.

runner."],"task_updates":[{"task_id":"T1","status":"done","executor_notes":"Removed the `isVideoEditorShellActive ? Kept the marginLeft, marginRight, and paddingTop video-editor overrides unchanged, and added `transition-[padding] duration-300 ease-smooth` to the video editor shell container.","files_changed":["src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.tsx"],"commands_run":["sed -n '1,180p' src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.tsx","git diff -- src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.tsx src/tools/video-editor/pages/VideoEditorPage.tsx","sed -n '30,90p' src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.tsx"]},{"task_id":"T2","status":"done","executor_notes":"Changed the `VideoEditorPage` root container from `h-screen w-screen` to `h-full w-full` so it respects the parent shell's padding-based bottom offset instead of measuring against the viewport. Verified by inspection that the parent video-editor shell main remains `h-full w-full overflow-hidden`, so fill behavior is preserved when no bottom pane offset is applied.","files_changed":["src/tools/video-editor/pages/VideoEditorPage.tsx"],"commands_run":["sed -n '260,330p' src/tools/video-editor/pages/VideoEditorPage.tsx","git diff -- src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.tsx src/tools/video-editor/pages/VideoEditorPage.tsx","sed -n '286,300p' src/tools/video-editor/pages/VideoEditorPage.tsx"]},{"task_id":"T3","status":"done","executor_notes":"Added two regression tests for the video editor shell path in `LayoutMainContent.test.tsx`: one asserts `paddingBottom: '180px'` when `isVideoEditorShellActive` and `isGenerationsPaneLocked` are true, and one asserts `paddingBottom: '0px'` when the generations pane is neither locked nor open. Verified by inspection that both tests reuse `defaultPanesState`, set `useVideoEditorRouteStateMock.mockReturnValue({ isEditorRoute: true, isVideoEditorShellActive: true })`, and read styles from `container.querySelector('.content-container')`.","files_changed":["src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.test.tsx"],"commands_run":["sed -n '1,260p' src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.test.tsx","sed -n '80,220p' src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.test.tsx","git diff -- src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.test.tsx"]},{"task_id":"T4","status":"blocked","executor_notes":"Executed the three requested Vitest suites. The initial bare `npx vitest run ...` invocations failed before discovery because the repo aliases were not loaded, so the suites were rerun with the repo-configured `config/testing/vitest.config.ts`. Final verification result: `src/features/layout/hooks/useBottomOffset.test.ts` passed (4/4), but `src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.test.tsx` failed 1 assertion in `renders global layout pieces and applies pane offsets`, and `src/shared/contexts/__tests__/PanesContext.test.tsx` failed 3 assertions around `effectiveEditorHeight` expectations. The batch therefore did not reach an all-green state.","files_changed":[],"commands_run":["npx vitest run src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.test.tsx","npx vitest run src/shared/contexts/__tests__/PanesContext.test.tsx","npx vitest run src/features/layout/hooks/useBottomOffset.test.ts","rg --files -g 'vitest*.{ts,js,mjs,cjs}' -g 'vite*.{ts,js,mjs,cjs}'","sed -n '1,220p' package.json","npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.test.tsx","npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/shared/contexts/__tests__/PanesContext.test.tsx","npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/features/layout/hooks/useBottomOffset.test.ts"]}],"sense_check_acknowledgments":[{"sense_check_id":"SC1","executor_note":"Yes. After the change, `paddingBottom` is `isMobileSplitView ? '0px' : ((isGenerationsPaneLocked || isGenerationsPaneOpen) ? `${effectiveGenerationsPaneHeight}px` : '0px')`, so it still resolves to `'0px'` when the bottom pane is neither locked nor open."},{"sense_check_id":"SC2","executor_note":"Yes. With the root changed to `h-full w-full`, the page now sizes to the parent `main` container, which is already `h-full w-full overflow-hidden` in video editor mode. When no generations pane padding is applied, the editor still fills the available space correctly."},{"sense_check_id":"SC3","executor_note":"Yes. Both new tests use the existing `useVideoEditorRouteStateMock.mockReturnValue({ isEditorRoute: true, isVideoEditorShellActive: true })` pattern and query the wrapper with `container.querySelector('.content-container')` before asserting `paddingBottom`."},{"sense_check_id":"SC4","executor_note":"No. Under the repo's configured Vitest runner, `src/features/layout/hooks/useBottomOffset.test.ts` passed, but `src/app/components/LayoutMainContent.test.tsx` failed 1 test and `src/shared/contexts/__tests__/PanesContext.test.tsx` failed 3 tests, so all three suites did not pass with zero failures."}]}
